TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kiloma'an == o kiloma'an ahana'nay i,masasiroro'ay kosowal no kasaniyaroaro'.o kilomaa'an hananay no katimolomol,o ilisin hananay no ka'amiamis. o kapot aca o selal o kapot hananay i o ksacecacecay nomasakapotay kakita'an o kakridan no niyaro' misacepo' i sakasepat a folad i tarariyar a misacepo'.
S.PHON: == ki…æo~uma °an == o~u ki…æo~uma °an aƒßana °naj i,masasiro~uro~u °aj ko~uso~uwa…æ no~u kasanijaro~uaro~u °.o~u ki…æo~umaa °an ƒßananaj no~u katimo~u…æo~umo~u…æ,o~u i…æisin ƒßananaj no~u ka °amiamis. o~u kapo~ut a ¶a o~u s…ô…æa…æ o~u kapo~ut ƒßananaj i o~u ksa ¶…ô ¶a ¶…ô ¶aj no~umasakapo~utaj kakita °an o~u kakri…¨~…Æan no~u nijaro~u ° misa ¶…ôpo~u ° i sakas…ôpat a fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ i tararijar a misa ¶…ôpo~u °.
S.FORM: == kiloma'an == o kiloma'an ahana'nay i,masasiroro'ay kosowal no kasaniyaroaro'.o kilomaa'an hananay no katimolomol,o ilisin hananay no ka'amiamis. o kapot aca o selal o kapot hananay i o ksacecacecay nomasakapotay kakita'an o kakridan no niyaro' misacepo' i sakasepat a folad i tarariyar a misacepo'.
S.PHON: == ki…æo~uma °an == o~u ki…æo~uma °an aƒßana °naj i,masasiro~uro~u °aj ko~uso~uwa…æ no~u kasanijaro~uaro~u °.o~u ki…æo~umaa °an ƒßananaj no~u katimo~u…æo~umo~u…æ,o~u i…æisin ƒßananaj no~u ka °amiamis. o~u kapo~ut a ¶a o~u s…ô…æa…æ o~u kapo~ut ƒßananaj i o~u ksa ¶…ô ¶a ¶…ô ¶aj no~umasakapo~utaj kakita °an o~u kakri…¨~…Æan no~u nijaro~u ° misa ¶…ôpo~u ° i sakas…ôpat a fo~u…æa…¨~…Æ i tararijar a misa ¶…ôpo~u °.
